headline: Clear calendar and no inbound fires — use today to push forward the two active Evals UX tickets before the next bi-weekly review cycle.

quick_wins.task: Pick up AE-1079: draft or outline the 'no ground truth' design doc for generated evaluations
quick_wins.why: It's in To Do with Normal priority — moving it to In Progress and sketching the doc frame takes <30 min and unblocks deeper work later today

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues with IT/DevOps
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures). You're flying blind on escalations and product metrics. A quick Slack message or IT ticket unblocks this.

must_make_progress.task: Advance AE-744: Justification + Actual vs Expected Evaluation Run results UX for all Evaluators
must_make_progress.why: Major priority, already In Progress. Evals UX is a key deliverable under the Agents Big Rock. No due date set — that itself is a risk; define scope and target date today.

must_make_progress.task: Draft the generated evaluations 'no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: Feeds into the broader evals strategy and the next bi-weekly TR. Having a first draft positions you to get feedback early.

must_communicate_with.about: Align on how 'no ground truth' evaluations interact with validation patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) — relevant to AE-1079
Confirm AE-744 scope and timeline; ensure alignment with 26.4+ key deliverables for evals

must_report_status.to: Agents Big Rock leadership (bi-weekly TR audience)
must_report_status.note: Next TR cycle approaching — update the Confluence page with current status so you're not scrambling at review time

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore dashboard

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — you have zero visibility into customer escalations. Treat as urgent.
Snowflake credentials are empty — product telemetry and MBR dashboard metrics are inaccessible.
Neither AE-744 nor AE-1079 has a due date set. Add target dates today to create accountability.
No Slack or email activity in the last 16h — unusually quiet. Verify notification integrations are working.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring visibility into escalations (Salesforce) and metrics (Snowflake) to avoid blind spots.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals UX work (AE-744, AE-1079) directly supports the Agents Big Rock adoption funnel; advancing these today moves the 26.4+ evals deliverable forward.

slack_summary: No meetings and no fires today — a rare deep-work day. Top priority: push AE-744 (Evals UX) forward and start the design doc for AE-1079 (no ground truth evaluations). Also critical: Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are both broken, leaving you blind on escalations and metrics — get IT on it early. Zero meetings today.
